behaviors: Guarding the sarcophagus. Attack on sight.
Animated by old necromancy, motionless until disturbed.
Patrols a fixed path, ignores anything not threatening.
Shambling in place, waiting for the living.
Clustered around a body. Rise when approached within 10 ft.
Wedged in a coffin, falls out when opened.
Feasting on a corpse. Looks up when the door opens.
Lurking in a pit beneath the floor (Search to notice).
Masquerading as a fresh corpse on a slab.
Armed with corroded swords, standing at attention.
Collapsed in a pile — animates when treasure is touched.
Standing in alcoves along the walls. Animate on entry.
Risen grave-diggers, still holding rusted shovels.
Hiding behind a sarcophagus. Waits for the party to split.
Three ghouls sharing a meal. They do not like to be interrupted.
Pack behavior — one distracts, others flank.
Nesting in the burial niches.
Merges with natural shadows. Difficult to see until it attacks.
Drawn to light sources. Extinguishes torches as a tactic.
The former crypt-keeper, risen to guard the vault.
Seated on a stone throne, motionless until approached.
Drifting near the ceiling, invisible from below.
Bound to a specific object in the room.
Clustered in an unlit alcove.
Following the party since the last room.
Wight lord with 1d4 skeleton thralls.
Waiting in a sealed sarcophagus.
Ancient guardian, patient and malevolent.
Pack of wraiths circling the room's centerpiece.
The tomb's true occupant, risen in wrath.
Seated in repose, surrounded by offerings.
The high priest of the crypt, never truly dead.
Bound to protect the inner vault.
The dynasty's last ruler, wrapped in gold-thread linen.
Accompanied by 1d4 skeleton honor guard.
Guarding the approach to a mummy's tomb.
Former noble, unrecognizable now.
Ancient vampire resting in a sealed sarcophagus.
In bat form, roosting on the ceiling.
Playing dice. Scramble for weapons when alarmed.
On guard duty, bored and inattentive.
Arguing noisily. Heard from outside the room.
Sleeping in shifts. Half are awake.
Eating loudly around a fire pit.
Wolf-riders on patrol. The wolves smell the party first.
Handler and wolves blocking a chokepoint.
Squad leader drilling three goblins.
Enforcer collecting tribute from goblin quarters.
Wolves in a crude kennel, chained. They can be loosed.
Wolves roaming freely, loyal to a nearby goblin.
Hobgoblin war-band, well-equipped.
Mercenaries hired by the goblin chief.
Hobgoblin garrison, organized and alert.
Drilling formation — ready for a fight.
Hulking bugbears waiting in ambush. They are very patient.
Bugbear chief and bodyguards, seated and expecting tribute.
Gnoll raiders using this as a base.
Gnoll slavers with 1d3 captured prisoners.
Single massive bugbear, blocking the only exit.
Bugbear and two trained wolves.
Gnolls gambling over humanoid bones.
Gnoll patrol, just returned from outside.
Ogre mercenary the goblins are terrified of.
Ogre eating — interrupted meals make ogres angry.
Ogre warband allied with the goblin king.
Ogres with a shared treasure hoard.
Troll enforcer for the goblin king.
Troll sleeping in a pile of bones.
Ogre gang with crude ranged weapons (javelins).
Pair of trolls, hunting together.
Troll with a pack of wolves.
Hill giant warlord commanding a goblin army.
Hill giant prisoner the goblins foolishly tried to contain.
Three trolls in a feeding frenzy.
Cultists in mid-ritual. They do not take interruptions well.
Zealots guarding the inner sanctum.
Beetles nesting behind the altar, skitter out when disturbed.
Beetles attracted to old offerings on the floor.
Centipedes in the altar cracks. Hard to see.
Nesting under loose flagstones.
Cultist guard with a prisoner.
Cultists performing a summoning. Almost done.
Spiders in webbing on the ceiling. Drop on intruders.
Web-wrapped bodies along the wall conceal spiders.
Acolytes in prayer. Their god is listening.
Acolyte with a religious relic they will die to protect.
Medusa priestess of the old faith, still worshipped.
Medusa posing as a statue. Many real statues nearby for camouflage.
Veteran fanatics, trained fighters. Morale 10 near their altar.
Execution squad with a captured adventurer.
Gargoyles disguised as decorative carvings on pillars.
Temple guardians, bound to attack on blasphemy.
Giant spiders in elaborate webs across the ritual chamber.
Spider with a web-wrapped treasure chest.
Gargoyle perched above the entrance, watching.
High priest — an ogre mage in disguise as a holy elder.
Ogre mage conducting a rite of power.
Avatar of the temple's patron, finally manifest.
Lamia poses as the oracle the cultists serve.
Lamia surrounded by charmed cultist bodyguards.
Temple guardian, locked in the inner sanctum.
Basilisk with petrified adventurers as decoration.
Vampire cult leader worshipped as a dark deity.
Vampire posing as the temple's high priest.
Ancient lamia, the temple's true ruler.
Basilisk pair nesting in the sanctum.
Guards at ease. Challenging anyone who enters.
Bandits gambling. Weapons within reach.
Patrol, recently returned, still alert.
Off-duty bandits eating. Only half are armed.
Sleeping quarters — most are asleep.
Archers positioned on high ground in the room.
Marksmen covering the door.
Veteran sergeants running drills.
Experienced fighters guarding the captain's quarters.
Large bandit mob, rowdy and overconfident.
Bandits dividing loot from a recent raid.
The bandit captain, flanked by two veteran bodyguards.
Captain planning a raid on a map table.
Elite bandit core, professional mercenaries.
Veterans interrogating a prisoner.
Mercenaries hired to reinforce the lair.
Mercenary squad with a designated leader.
Orc mercenaries employed by the bandits.
Orcs and bandits sharing a tense meal.
Captain with full bodyguard retinue.
Lieutenant captain left in charge.
Gnoll auxiliaries, muscle for the bandits.
Gnolls doing the dirty work no bandit will.
Ogre enforcer for the bandit lord.
Ogre gatekeeper, very territorial.
Ogre war-band in the bandit army.
The bandit lord in their throne room.
Bandit lord with a full council of captains.
Troll prison guards. Their lair smells accordingly.
Troll bound in service to the bandit lord.
Bandit lord planning a major assault.
Elite mercenary company, professional and dangerous.
Battle-hardened veterans with magic equipment.
Ogre mob, recently recruited.
Bats roosting on the ceiling. Disturbed by light.
Colony disturbed by the party's noise.
Rats in a den, defending their nest.
Rats swarming a food cache they found.
Cave locusts filling the chamber. They shriek when startled.
Locusts grazing on fungal patches.
Mother bear with 1d2 cubs. Extremely aggressive.
Bear defending a food cache.
Ferrets hunting for prey. Fast and relentless.
Giant ferret with a nest of pups.
Gray ooze blending with wet cavern walls. Almost invisible.
Ooze covering the floor of a passage.
Cave bear in its den. Has it heard you yet?
Enormous cave bear with two half-grown cubs.
Ochre jelly oozing from a crack in the wall.
Jelly filling a low passage; unavoidable.
Wererats posing as human survivors.
Wererat thieves using the cave as a hideout.
Ghouls driven from a crypt, now hunting in the caves.
Cockatrice nesting among petrified victims.
Cockatrice flock blocking a passage.
Green slime hanging from the cave ceiling.
Slime covering an otherwise appealing ledge.
Cave bear pack — unheard of, but here we are.
Trolls using this cave as their hunting ground.
Minotaur lord of this cave system.
Minotaur guarding its territory with fury.
Purple worm burrowed up through the floor.
The sound of the worm approaching — roll init.
Troll feeding on a giant bat.
Young cave dragon claiming this as its lair.
Dragon sleeping on a small hoard.
Troglodytes that moved in after the dwarves fled.
Troglodyte hunting party, surprised to see you.
Kobold scavengers stripping dwarven metal.
Kobolds with a crude trap they're very proud of.
Mad dwarf survivors, deeply suspicious of outsiders.
Dwarf recluse who never left. Attacks on sight.
Dwarven ancestor statues, still animated by old magic.
Stone sentinel activates when treasure is approached.
Large troglodyte warband raiding the ruin.
Gnome treasure-hunters, not friendly to competition.
Gnome tinkerers operating a surviving dwarven machine.
Iron dwarf construct, guardian of the vault.
Iron sentinel awakening as the party enters.
Doppelganger posing as a friendly dwarven ghost.
Doppelgangers that have taken the forms of an earlier party.
Medusa using the ruin as a lair, surrounded by stone victims.
Dwarven berserkers, cursed to guard the ruin forever.
Mad dwarf warriors, attacking everything.
Stone gargoyles, mistaken for dwarven carvings.
Doppelganger has taken the form of a party member.
Dwarven stone golem, the final guardian of the vault.
Golem damaged by age — but still terrifying.
The legendary iron golem of Clan Deepdelve, still active.
Iron golem forged to protect the clan vault.
Trolls drawn by old rumors of dwarven gold.
Vampire lord who conquered the ruin centuries ago.
Second golem, paired with the first.
Young earth dragon denning in the collapsed great hall.
Apprentices working on an experiment. Interrupted.
Apprentice left in charge; panicking.
Escaped test subjects, extremely dangerous.
Spiders nesting among discarded spell components.
The wizard's little spies, defending their creator's lab.
Homunculi with orders to kill intruders.
Crystal guardian placed at the threshold.
Appears as decorative art. Activates when touched.
Resident mage, mid-experiment. Furious at the interruption.
Mage with a hostage using as a research subject.
The wizard's imp servants, chaotic and mischievous.
Imps escaped from a summoning circle.
Senior mage, powerful and paranoid.
Mage with a golem bodyguard.
Magically bound guardians, cannot leave the room.
Gargoyles sculpted to look like failed experiments.
The wizard's failed creation, dangerously unstable.
Flesh golem escaped from its containment.
Experiment gone wrong — basilisk in a shattered cage.
Basilisk with mirror-system that turns its gaze back on intruders.
Phase spiders from a botched summoning.
Phase spider hunting prey, appearing and vanishing.
Djinni bound in a flask. Released — and furious.
Bound djinni, neutral, will negotiate if spoken to.
The tower's master, expecting visitors.
Archmage mid-ritual, vulnerable only now.
Vampire archmage who betrayed the tower's founder.
Undead mage still conducting research.
A pair of flesh golems, the tower's last defense.
Efreeti imprisoned here. It will offer three wishes — with strings.
Efreeti freed from a shattered binding circle. Angry.
Two djinn, one bound and one free — they argue.
The tower's founder, never truly gone.
Lich in phylactery-meditation. Disturbing it is a mistake.
